q.rationale: The existing v3 distribution-retention × moat-retention judgment is reused as a bounded Stage 1 commercial-retention proxy.

leaves.rationale: Predeclared bounded demand/operator row for the inherited v3 terminal class; unknown classes remain missing.

e.rationale: Global eligible-union share; heterogeneous records use the predeclared wider/lower class-count row.

n.detail: margin 0.1565 (margins.json[54]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Business & Consumer Services EBITDA/Sales 15.65%); revenue/employee $263,174 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 541310); class <5: 13,996 firms, avg revenue/firm $377,518 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $59,082 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 3,719 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,387,500 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $217,144 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 1,928 firms, avg revenue/firm $3,115,513 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $487,578 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 1,361 firms, avg revenue/firm $10,632,600 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,664,002 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 228 firms, avg revenue/firm $44,196,899 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $6,916,815 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 62 firms, avg revenue/firm $111,625,710 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $17,469,424 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 1,589

s5.rationale: Fixed transform of the disclosed v3 owner-age range into five-year qualifying control-transfer propensity.

a.rationale: AI targets production and administrative tasks rather than accountable design/field work.

l.detail: BLS Industry Productivity (IPS) direct: labor compensation (L02) $25,388.4M / sectoral output (T30) $54,890.2M, year 2022

rho.rationale: Fixed outcome-blind transform of the v3 t50 adoption estimate, widened by the declared bridge error.

material_findings.materiality: pi_dist enters C linearly. Holding pi_moat at 0.55, a selected pi_dist of 0.25 or 0.75 would move C from 2.75 to 1.375 or 4.125. Because S1 does not anchor the selected value or its direction, the capture factor can change materially even though the current zero M factor still forces the overall kill verdict.

Separating survival of paid licensed work from an operator's ability to retain AI-created savings could materially change pi_moat and therefore C while leaving terminal demand DURABLE. For example, a 0.20 change in pi_moat moves C by 1.0 at the selected pi_dist, so this prohibited capture/terminal overlap can materially change a factor.

Holding the other recorded inputs fixed, changing owners_60plus_pct from 0.30 to 0.10 changes B from 6.12 to about 2.56; changing the unsupported consolidator count also changes the crowding penalty. The ungrounded selections therefore can materially change the buyability factor.

source_review.summary: Reject. Exact packet/run/memo identity, schema, model route, dataset injection, fresh finalization, fresh memo rendering, digests, and arithmetic all pass. S4 supports the remediated 4.92x entry benchmark and the no-expansion exit is clearly labeled as an estimate. However, the capture estimate lacks relevant pricing evidence, licensing is used for both capture and terminal demand without distinct channels, and the ownership/consolidator inputs that drive B are unsupported; each defect can materially change a factor.

sources.title: AIA AI research in architecture
sources.what_it_supports: AIA reports only 6% regularly used AI in 2025.

sources.title: Deltek Clarity A&E 2026
sources.what_it_supports: Deltek surveyed 896 A&E firms; AI maturity and ROI remain uneven.

sources.title: NCARB Model Law
sources.what_it_supports: Model law excludes detached one/two-family dwellings and some alterations from licensed practice.

sources.title: ROG 13th Edition A/E Business Valuation and M&A Transaction Study summary
sources.what_it_supports: ROG's 2026 study, derived from 252 transactions and data points, reports a 4.92x median EBITDA multiple for architecture firms in controlling-interest external transactions; it separately labels the minority series pre-owner-bonus.
